title: Fix admin panel: failed to load users and failed to update maintenance mode errors

requirements.text: Fix the 'Failed to load users. Please try again.' error in the Users & Controls tab of the admin panel. The backend query for fetching registered users must return successfully, and the frontend must correctly call and handle the response from the backend's user listing function.

quotes: Failed to load users. Please try again.

acceptanceCriteria: The Registered Users section in the admin panel loads and displays all registered users without showing an error.
The search by Unique ID or name field functions correctly after users load.
If no users are registered, an appropriate empty state is shown instead of an error.

requirements.text: Fix the 'Failed to update maintenance mode. Please try again.' error shown when toggling the Maintenance Mode switch in the admin panel. The backend mutation for setting maintenance mode must succeed, and the frontend must correctly call the backend function with proper authorization and handle the response.

quotes: Failed to update maintenance mode. Please try again.

acceptanceCriteria: Toggling the Maintenance Mode switch in the admin panel succeeds without showing an error toast.
After toggling, the switch state reflects the actual maintenance mode state from the backend.
The 'App is Live' / maintenance active label updates correctly after a successful toggle.

constraints: Do not change the PIN-based authentication logic in PINAuthGuard.tsx.
Do not alter immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding new admin features beyond fixing the existing errors.
Changing user registration or login flow.
